title: Officers Realize There's A Body In Families Trash Can
description:

Police arrived at the home of Keith and Amber Zotto after Amber's mother, Bette, called 911 earlier that day. Amber hadn't answered any calls or messages for two days, and Bette feared something was wrong. When police arrived, they'd discover something horrifying...
